title: Apple Armor
description: [Fabric] Adds full Apple & Golden Apple Armor Set
body:
Vanilla+ mod for people who drink applesauce all by themselve
 

# Features
## Apple Armor
- Replenishes hunger upon being damaged.
- Wearing multiple pieces has slight diminishing returns. Meaning wearing 3 pieces (e.g. Helmet, Leggins & Chestplate) does not equal 3x the effect of wearing only 1 piece (e.g. only the helmet). This would be closer to 2.5x effectiveness.
- Wearing the full set of Apple Armor additionally increases the effect.
- Protection Enchantments increase the effect.
- When a armor piece breaks an apple gets dropped (2 for chestplate).
## Golden Apple Armor
- Includes every Apple Armor feature.
- Bestows same status effects as golden apples upon being damaged.
- Try enchanting the armor! (doesnt matter which enchantment)
## General
- Every variable is fully customizable. (Configuration can be accessed through the options screen and clicking the button with a round symbol in the top left or through using ModMenu.) 

 

# Installation
- Install Fabric
- Navigate to your .minecraft folder (in the MC launcher select the "installation" header and click the file icon next to your fabric installation)
- Download matching version of the mod and place the .jar file in .minecraft/mods
- Play :)
 

# Supported Languages
- English
- German
